description: Education Tier-B actor — open-curriculum literacy + numeracy + civics/charter + vocational + lifelong inquiry. Anti-credentialism (§2(e)) + anti-addiction UX (§2(d)) + minor privacy (G6) + comparative religion (G14) constitutional invariants. Delivers L4 (literacy/civics) and L5 (vocational/advanced) tiers of the Liberation Ladder.
